name: Spectrum & Resolvent
description: σ(T) spectrum, ρ(T) resolvent set. R_λ=(T−λI)⁻¹. Spectral radius r(T)=lim ‖Tⁿ‖^{1/n}.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: σT spectrum\nT−λ not invertible"]
    D2["Def: Resolvent ρT\nℂ∖σT"]
    D3["Def: R_λ = T−λ⁻¹\nresolvent op"]
    D4["Def: Spectral radius\nrT = sup|λ|"]
    T1["Thm: σT closed\nnonempty if dim<∞"]
    T2["Thm: rT = lim ‖Tⁿ‖¹/ⁿ"]
    T3["Thm: Gelfand\nrT = sup spec"]
    T4["Thm: Resolvent analytic\non ρT"]
    T5["Thm: Neumann series\n‖T‖<1⇒(I−T)⁻¹"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> T4
    D4 --> T2
    T2 --> T3
    T4 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
